MASTER COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-05-2024 - EILEEN SIMON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF ELENA BOKOVA. DEFENDANT KONSTANTIN MIATCHINE, APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. NO APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT FUMIKO NOMURA. MR. MIATCHINE INDICATED THAT MS. NOMURA HAD AN EMERGENCY OUT OF THE COUNTRY. JUDGE MASSULLO HELD A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE PARTIES AND CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 08/08/24 FOR THE EXECUTION OF A STIPULATED JUDGMENT. MS. SIMON TO SEND THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT TO MR. MIATCHINE AND TO HIS PRIOR COUNSEL AS WELL. MS. SIMON TO INFORM THE COURT VIA EMAIL AT DEPARTMENT206@SFTC.ORG WITH A CC TO DEFENDANT & HIS PRIOR COUNSEL IF THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SIGNED. IF SIGNED, THEN PARTIES DO NOT NEED TO APPEAR ON 08/08/24 AND THE COURT WILL SET THE MATTER TO A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR 01/15/25 AT 10:30AM IN DEPT. 610 TO MANAGE THE SETTLEMENT. IF NOT SIGNED, THEN PARTIES NEED TO APPEAR ON 08/08/24 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR TRIAL CALL. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED 08/08/24 TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
